episodes.title: Speedrunning a Cult: The Internet vs. Scientology
episodes.description:
The trend of "speedrunning" Scientology started March 2026 in Hollywood and quickly exploded online. What began as a bizarre internet challenge—seeing how fast someone can enter church facilities before getting stopped while filming —has turned into a highly controversial debate over activism versus trespassing. Is this a modern form of protest, or are people just raiding a church?

00:00 - Welcome to Scientology Hollywood
00:25 - "They Will Destroy Your Life"
01:14 - The Speedrunning Trend Explained
01:43 - NYC Booby Traps & The Boston Tea Party
03:03 - Activism While Going Viral
03:24 - Physical Confrontations
03:57 - Little Person Speed run
04:24 - Hate Crimes & Arrests
04:51 - Paranoia & Threats
05:09 - The Final Verdict: Is it Justified?
